parameters: \se[25-nb]\SM[jump]\SA[130]Y-Yaho~, \n[2]. What were you doing at the cafe?
I puffed up my chest and told her that I was studying.
...In reality, it stopped at nothing more than an attempt, of course.
\SE[1]Fufuh--, that's nice. ...Now that I think back,
I used to study here a lot too~.
\SE[5]It's easier to get stuff done in a different environment from usual, isn't it?~
Yepyep, I nodded vigorously, trying not to let her see the sweat
starting to bead up around my forehead.
Hmm, she feels very different from her usual self.
I feel like I've seen her being exactly like this once before somewhere...
\se[16-nb]...Ahahah--... am I that easy to see through?
\se[23-nb]That's amazing, \n[2]. Sharpen that sense and you're gonna be a real ladies man, you
know?~You're gonna make onee-chan here fall for you too♥... Ahahah--, it's a joke, a joke...
\SE[11-nb]So well, how should I explain it?
It's something I'm excited about... but also scared.
\se[17-nb]And I'm the one who brought it up first but,
but now I'm not so sure if it's the right thing to do.
\se[21-nb]Ahahah... I've been pretty uncool lately, haven't I?
Sorry. I know you don't want to see me like this.
\SE[12-nb]I'm supposed to be the onee-chan that you two look up to...
Seeing her look so down, for once, I spoke clearly.
I know you'll be fine, Rino nee-san.
I know you'll be fine, Rino nee-san.
It was the truth, from my heart.
Honestly, I don't know what's bothering her so much.
But they're the words of a guy that's looked at her for all these years, so she'll be fine, really.
I wanted to push her onwards, with confidence.
Since it's the least I can do, to repay her for always being there
\se[24-nb]...Thank you, you know I... I love you, \n[2].
\se[15-nb]\sa[124]\SM[double]I guess I'll just have to do my best since you're cheering me on~!
\se[22-nb]Ufufuh, I'll go and... open the door to the new me.
I saw her off as she left with a spring in her step.
--That should have been the right move. Do your best, Rino nee-san.
Would you like to view Rino's viewpoint?
